channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window and Upcoming Board Meeting for FY 2025-26 Results
item.description:
Coforge Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from April 01, 2026. The closure is for the purpose of considering the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and other matters. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results. The Company's Board of Directors will meet on May 05, 2026, to consider and approve the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider the proposal of payment of Interim Dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26 and determine the Record date for the purpose of the Interim Dividend. A conference call with Analysts and Institutional Investors is scheduled after the Board meeting, and the details will be disclosed on the Company's website.

  • Closure of trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026
  • Board meeting scheduled on May 05, 2026, to consider and approve financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Consideration of Interim Dividend payment for Financial Year 2025-26
  • Determination of Record date for Interim Dividend payment
  • Scheduled conference call with Analysts and Institutional Investors after the Board meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TORNTPHARM] Torrent Pharmaceuticals to Amalgamate with J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals: NCLT Meeting Notice
item.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited has issued a notice to shareholders for a meeting convened by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The meeting, to be held on April 28, 2026, will consider and approve the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited and their respective shareholders under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The meeting will be conducted through video conferencing / other audio-visual means. Remote e-voting will be available from April 24 to April 27, 2026, and e-voting at the meeting will be available for those who have not voted through remote e-voting.

  • Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited and J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited proposed Scheme of Amalgamation
  • Meeting of equity shareholders to be held on April 28, 2026
  • Meeting to be conducted through video conferencing / other audio-visual means
  • Remote e-voting from April 24 to April 27, 2026
  • E-voting at the meeting for those who have not voted through remote e-voting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TORRENT PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RNAVAL] Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd Completes Full Repayment to Committee of Creditors
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the exchange that the Company, on 27th March, 2026, has concluded making full and final repayment to all Committee of Creditors' members. This repayment is in accordance with the Resolution plan pursuant to the NCLT Order dated 23.12.2022.

  • Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd has completed full and final repayment to all Committee of Creditors' members.
  • The repayment is in accordance with the Resolution plan pursuant to the NCLT Order dated 23.12.2022.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Reliance Naval and Engineering Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [CIGNITI] Cigniti Technologies' Amalgamation Scheme Order Reserved by NCLT
item.description:
Cigniti Technologies Ltd. has announced that the order in connection with the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation with Coforge Limited has been reserved for formal pronouncement by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The Statutory Authorities have recorded their no-objection to the sanctioning of the Scheme. The company will notify the Stock Exchanges and update their website upon receipt of the NCLT order.

  • Order for Cigniti Technologies' amalgamation scheme reserved by NCLT
  • Statutory Authorities have recorded no-objection to the scheme
  • Company to notify Stock Exchanges and update website upon receipt of NCLT order

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CIGNITI TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [KIRLFER] Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window from 1 April 2026 to 15 May 2026
item.description:
Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its Trading Window from 1 April 2026 to 15 May 2026. This decision is in accordance with the 'Code of Conduct for regulating, monitoring and reporting of trading by Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited' adopted under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. All stakeholders are requested to take note of this development.

  • Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd closes its Trading Window from 1 April 2026 to 15 May 2026
  • The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • The closure is part of the 'Code of Conduct for regulating, monitoring and reporting of trading by Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited'

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRLOSKAR FERROUS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge Ltd Appoints Mr. Vivek Sharma as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Coforge Ltd has approved the appointment of Mr. Vivek Sharma as an Additional Director and Non-Executive Independent Director for a term of 5 years, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Sharma is currently on the boards of Kaiser Permanente and JetBlue Airways and is an adjunct professor of data science at the University of Southern California. He has also authored two books on AI and data science. Mr. Sharma is not related to any of the Directors of the Company.

  • Coforge Ltd appoints Mr. Vivek Sharma as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Mr. Sharma to serve for a term of 5 years, subject to shareholder approval
  • Mr. Sharma is currently on the boards of Kaiser Permanente and JetBlue Airways
  • Mr. Sharma is an adjunct professor of data science at the University of Southern California
  • Mr. Sharma has authored two books on AI and data science

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VISVEN] Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The closure is effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, and is in connection with the approval of the unaudited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the results are declared and disseminated to the Stock Exchanges.

  • Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd closes trading window for designated persons
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Closure connected with the approval of unaudited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after results are declared and disseminated

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Avenir Investment RSC to Acquire Controlling Stake in Sammaan Capital Limited for INR 8,849 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sammaan Capital Limited has announced that all regulatory approvals have been received for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd. The transaction, which is expected to be concluded at the earliest, will see Avenir Investment invest approximately INR 8,849 crore in Sammaan Capital. Upon completion of the transaction, Avenir Investment will hold approximately 41.2% of the paid-up equity share capital of Sammaan Capital.

  • Avenir Investment RSC to acquire controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited
  • Total investment of approximately INR 8,849 crore
  • All regulatory approvals received
  • Avenir Investment to hold approximately 41.2% of Sammaan Capital's paid-up equity share capital post-transaction
  • Transaction expected to be concluded at the earliest

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [EIHAHOTELS] EIH Associated Hotels Faces Rs 33 Lakh Penalty from GST Authorities
item.description:
EIH Associated Hotels Ltd. has been levied a penalty of Rs 33,03,083/- under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Service Tax Act, 2017 by the GST Authorities, Jaipur. The penalty is in relation to ITC claim on Input Services for the Financial Years 2018-19 to 2022-23 for Trident Jaipur, a hotel of the Company. The order was received on 27th March 2026 at 6:34 P.M and the financial impact is to the extent of the penalty imposed. The company plans to take appropriate action within the statutory time limit.

  • EIH Associated Hotels Ltd. faces a penalty of Rs 33,03,083/- from GST Authorities
  • The penalty is in relation to ITC claim on Input Services for the Financial Years 2018-19 to 2022-23
  • The order was received on 27th March 2026 at 6:34 P.M
  • The financial impact is to the extent of the penalty imposed
  • The company plans to take appropriate action within the statutory time limit

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EIH ASSOCIATED HOTELS LTD.-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [GOLDLEG] Golden Legand Leasing & Finance Ltd Allots 6,63,51,000 Convertible Warrants to Public Category
item.description:
Golden Legand Leasing & Finance Ltd has allotted 6,63,51,000 convertible warrants to non-promoter public category allottees. The allotment is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018 and other applicable rules/regulations. The warrants, carrying an option to subscribe to the equity share of the Company, can be converted into 1 (One) fully paid-up equity share at an issue price of Rs. 12.96/- (Rupees Twelve and Ninety-Six Paise Only) including premium of Rs. 2.96 /- (Rupees Two and Ninety Six Paise Only) within 18 months from the date of allotment. The total consideration for the warrants is Rs. 21,49,77,240/- (Rupees Twenty-One Crore Forty-Nine Lakhs Seventy-Seven Thousand and Two Hundred and Forty only). The allottees include Mariango Trading Private Limited, Mocktail Trading Private Limited, Pearl Dealers Private Limited, Orchard Road Properties Private Limited, Sandarv Trading Private Limited, Ultimate Annex Trading Private Limited, Spunwell Technology Private Limited, Divya Singh Kushwaha, Jayanta Roy, and Jaspreet Kaur.

  • Golden Legand Leasing & Finance Ltd allots 6,63,51,000 convertible warrants to non-promoter public category allottees.
  • The warrants can be converted into 1 (One) fully paid-up equity share at an issue price of Rs. 12.96/- including premium of Rs. 2.96 /- within 18 months from the date of allotment.
  • The total consideration for the warrants is Rs. 21,49,77,240/-.
  • The allottees include various private limited companies and individuals.
  • The allotment is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018 and other applicable rules/regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOLDEN LEGAND LEASING & FINANCE LTD. | Category: New Launch
